user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new employee dependant type, so that employees can register dependants of the correct relationship
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Dependant Types screen; When I click Add new employee dependant type and enter a name and description; Then the dependant type is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all dependant types with name and description, so that I can review the available relationships
acceptance_criteria: Given dependant types exist; When I open the list; Then each row shows Name and Description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing dependant type, so that I can correct or update its details
acceptance_criteria: Given a dependant type is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated type is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the dependant types list, so that I see the current set
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Dependant Types screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads
